## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Why is this change needed?

## Changes

- [ ] New skill added
- [ ] Existing skill updated
- [ ] CI/CD or tooling change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] CLI commands tested against `kpass` CLI
- [ ] Cross-references updated in other skills (if applicable)
- [ ] `skills.json` updated (if adding/removing a skill)
